# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.
# Category: datastore_security

repositories:
  backup_repo_s3:
    type: s3
    settings:
      bucket: elasticsearch-snapshots
      region: us-east-1
      base_path: prod-cluster
      compress: true
  backup_repo_fs:
    type: fs
    settings:
      location: /mnt/elasticsearch/snapshots
      compress: true

slm:
  enabled: true
  policies:
    daily_backup_policy:
      schedule: "0 30 1 * * ?"
      name: "daily-snapshot-{now/d}"
      repository: backup_repo_s3
      config:
        indices:
          - "*"
        ignore_unavailable: true
        include_global_state: true
      retention:
        expire_after: 30d
        min_count: 7
        max_count: 60

snapshot_operations:
  create_snapshot:
    repository: backup_repo_s3
    snapshot: "manual-snapshot-{now/d}"
    indices:
      - "*"
    ignore_unavailable: true
    include_global_state: true
  restore_snapshot:
    repository: backup_repo_s3
    snapshot: "{{snapshot_name}}"
    indices:
      - "*"
    ignore_unavailable: true
    include_global_state: true
    rename_pattern: "(.+)"
    rename_replacement: "restored-$1"

file_share_operations:
  create_snapshot:
    repository: backup_repo_fs
    snapshot: "manual-fs-snapshot-{now/d}"
    indices:
      - "*"
    ignore_unavailable: true
    include_global_state: true
  restore_snapshot:
    repository: backup_repo_fs
    snapshot: "{{snapshot_name}}"
    indices:
      - "*"
    ignore_unavailable: true
    include_global_state: true
    rename_pattern: "(.+)"
    rename_replacement: "restored-$1"
